examples: "What d'you think?" she asked in an undertone.
His soft words contained an undertone of warning.
He added in an undertone to the Queen, "Really, my dear, YOU must cross-examine the next witness."
There was also a slight undertone of dark porter beer, which Red Apron uses in the emulsion process.
And there's starting to be a little bit of an undertone of that in this conversation.
